dateTimePicker.title: DateTimePicker
dateTimePicker.description: Inline date and time selector. Shows a monthly calendar alongside scrollable time columns. Supports 12/24h formats, seconds and minute step.

props.format: Time format of the time selector.
props.step: Minute increment for the minutes column.
props.color: Accent color for the selected day.
props.variant: Visual style of the calendar panel.
props.locale: Locale for month and day names (e.g. en-US).

basic24.title: 24h (default)
basic24.desc: 24-hour mode with hour and minute columns.

basic24h.title: 24h (default)
basic24h.desc: 24-hour mode with hour and minute columns.

format12.title: 12h format
format12.desc: Adds the AM/PM column for regions that prefer the 12-hour clock.

format12h.title: 12h format
format12h.desc: Adds the AM/PM column for regions that prefer the 12-hour clock.

seconds.title: 12h with seconds
seconds.desc: Enable show-seconds to show the seconds column.

seconds12h.title: 12h with seconds
seconds12h.desc: Enable show-seconds to show the seconds column.

step.title: 15-minute step
step.desc: step="15" groups minutes in 15-unit increments, ideal for schedules.

step15.title: 15-minute step
step15.desc: step="15" groups minutes in 15-unit increments, ideal for schedules.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Perimeter border for neutral backgrounds or cards.
